title: Inconsistent behaviour of `\\` in normal query and prepared statement
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(c1 VARCHAR(50), c2 INT, c3 DECIMAL(10,2));
SELECT (('\6' IS TRUE) NOT IN (c1, CAST(c2 AS CHAR)) OR c3 IS NULL) FROM t1;
SELECT (('\6' IS TRUE) NOT IN (c1, CAST(@b AS CHAR)) OR c3 IS NULL) FROM t1;
key_bug_features: Inconsistent handling of backslashes in queries
